zy1git: I took a look at the test errors and wanted to share a few observations:

a, the signature order does not match F.resize: resize_mask(mask, size, max_size, interpolation) should be resize_ma

data.rationale:
Maintainer replied on pytorch/vision#9384: zy1git: I took a look at the test errors and wanted to share a few observations:

a, the signature order does not match F.resize: resize_mask(mask, size, max_size, interpolation) should be resize_mask(mask, — review and reply, or authorize an agent reply.
CLA check `verification/cla-signed` is blocking determined-ai/determined#10265. Sign once for the org; the harness retries after.
